name: Category: OWASP Top Ten 2004 Category A8 - Insecure Storage
description: This is a category grouping weaknesses related to the A8 category in the OWASP Top Ten 2004, covering insecure storage including missing encryption of sensitive data, hard-coded cryptographic keys, inadequate encryption strength, and use of broken cryptographic algorithms. Categories are informal organizational groupings and are prohibited for vulnerability mapping since 2019.
